metadata.source: Local news reporting (addresses) + OpenStreetMap Nominatim geocoding (coordinates)
notes: Public-only. Coordinates are derived via OpenStreetMap Nominatim geocoding of addresses cited in sources.
This layer is intended to be paired with the MLGW substation work layer to visualize proximity/timing relationships.

properties.name: 2875 Stanton Road site (Southaven, MS)
properties.narrative: Southaven (former power plant). Part of 2 GW push; same firm-power + substation process as Colossus.
properties.geocoding_display_name: 2875, Stanton Road South, Southaven, DeSoto County, Mississippi, 38671, United States

properties.name: 2400 Stateline Rd West site (Southaven, MS)
properties.narrative: Stateline (Southaven). Part of 2 GW push. Constraint: firm power contract + MLGW delivery timing, not TVA generation.
properties.geocoding_display_name: 2400, Stateline Road West, Southaven, DeSoto County, Mississippi, 38671, United States

properties.name: 5420 Tulane Road site (Memphis, TN)
properties.narrative: Colossus (third building). First 150 MW had TVA board approval: demand response, new substation, reserve margin. That blueprint applies to next projects (18–36 mo). 2 GW push = here + Southaven.
properties.source: 512 Pixels quoting MLGW statement + Nominatim geocoding
properties.geocoding_display_name: xAI Macrohard Colossus 2, 5420, Tulane Road, Memphis, Shelby County, West Tennessee, Tennessee, 38109, United States
